title: A Touch of Larceny
writer: Paul Somers, Roger MacDougall, Ivan Foxwell
actors: James Mason, George Sanders, Vera Miles
plot: Royal Navy Commander Max Easton fakes his defection to the Soviets in order to sue the slandering newspapers for the money he needs to woo a fancy American woman.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
